{{Navbox
| name = Political philosophy
| state = {{{state<includeonly>|collapsed</includeonly>}}}
| title  = [[Political philosophy]]
| bodyclass  = hlist

| group1 = Terms
| list1  =
* [[Authority]]
* [[Citizenship‎]]
* [[Duty]]
* [[Elite]]
* [[Emancipation]]
* [[Freedom]]
* [[Government]]
* [[Hegemony]]
* [[Hierarchy]]
* [[Justice]]
* [[Law]]
* [[Legitimacy (political)|Legitimacy]]
* [[Liberty]]
* [[Monopoly]]
* [[Nation]]
* [[Obedience (human behavior)|Obedience]]
* [[Peace]]
* [[Pluralism (political philosophy)|Pluralism]]
* [[Power (social and political)|Power]]
* [[Progress]]
* [[Propaganda]]
* [[Property]]
* [[Revolution]]
* [[Rights]]
* [[Ruling class]]
* [[Society]]
* [[Sovereignty‎]]
* [[State (polity)|State]]
* [[Utopia]]
* [[War]]

| group2 = Government
| list2  =
* [[Aristocracy]]
* [[Autocracy]]
* [[Bureaucracy]]
* [[Dictatorship]]
* [[Democracy]]
* [[Meritocracy]]
* [[Monarchy]]
* [[Oligarchy]]
* [[Plutocracy]]
* [[Technocracy]]
* [[Theocracy]]

| group3 = Ideologies
| list3  =
* [[Agrarianism]]
* [[Anarchism]]
* [[Capitalism]]
* [[Christian democracy]]
* [[Colonialism]]
* [[Communism]]
* [[Communitarianism]]
* [[Confucianism]]
* [[Conservatism]]
* [[Corporatism]]
* [[Distributism]]
* [[Environmentalism]]
* [[Fascism]]
* [[Feminist political theory|Feminism]]
* [[Feudalism]]
* [[Imperialism]]
* [[Islamism]]
* [[Liberalism]]
* [[Libertarianism]]
* [[Localism (politics)|Localism]]
* [[Marxism]]
* [[Monarchism]]
* [[Multiculturalism]]
* [[Nationalism]]
* [[Nazism]]
* [[Populism]]
* [[Republicanism]]
* [[Social Darwinism]]
* [[Social democracy]]
* [[Socialism]]
* [[Third Way]]

| group4 = Concepts
| list4 =
* [[Balance of power (international relations)|Balance of power]]
* {{lang|la|[[Bellum omnium contra omnes]]}}
* [[Body politic]]
* [[Clash of Civilizations|Clash of civilizations]]
* [[Common good]]
* [[Consent of the governed]]
* [[Divine right of kings]]
* [[Family as a model for the state]]
* [[Monopoly on violence]]
* [[Natural law]]
* [[Negative and positive rights]]
* [[Night-watchman state]]
* [[Noble lie]]
* {{lang|fr|[[Noblesse oblige]]}}
* [[Open society]]
* [[Ordered liberty]]
* [[Original position]]
* [[Overton window]]
* [[Separation of powers]]
* [[Social contract]]
* [[State of nature]]
* [[Statolatry]]
* [[Tyranny of the majority]]

| group5 = [[List of political philosophers|Philosophers]]
| list5 = {{Navbox|child
| group1 = Ancient
| list1  =
* [[Aristotle]]
* [[Chanakya]]
* [[Cicero]]
* [[Confucius]]
* [[Han Fei]]
* [[Lactantius]]
* [[Mencius]]
* [[Mozi]]
* [[Plato]]
** [[Plato's political philosophy|political philosophy]]
* [[Polybius]]
* [[Shang Yang|Shang]]
* [[Sun Tzu]]
* [[Thucydides]]
* [[Xenophon]]

| group2 = Medieval
| list2  =
* [[Al-Farabi|Alpharabius]]
* [[Thomas Aquinas|Aquinas]]
* [[Averroes]]
* [[Leonardo Bruni|Bruni]]
* [[Dante Alighieri|Dante]]
* [[Pope Gelasius I|Gelasius]]
* [[al-Ghazali]]
* [[Ibn Khaldun]]
* [[Marsilius of Padua|Marsilius]]
* [[Muhammad]]
* [[Nizam al-Mulk]]
* [[William of Ockham|Ockham]]
* [[Gemistos Plethon|Plethon]]
* [[Wang Anshi|Wang]]

| group3 = Early modern
| list3 = 
* [[Étienne de La Boétie|Boétie]]
* [[Jean Bodin|Bodin]]
* [[Jacques-Bénigne Bossuet|Bossuet]]
* [[John Calvin|Calvin]]
* [[Tommaso Campanella|Campanella]]
* [[Robert Filmer|Filmer]]
* [[Hugo Grotius|Grotius]]
* [[Francesco Guicciardini|Guicciardini]]
* [[Thomas Hobbes|Hobbes]]
** [[Hobbes's moral and political philosophy|political philosophy]]
* [[James VI and I|James]]
* [[Gottfried Wilhelm Leibniz|Leibniz]]
* [[John Locke|Locke]]
* [[Martin Luther|Luther]]
* [[Niccolò Machiavelli|Machiavelli]]
* [[John Milton|Milton]]
* [[Thomas More|More]]
* [[Thomas Müntzer|Müntzer]]
* [[Samuel von Pufendorf|Pufendorf]]
* [[Baruch Spinoza|Spinoza]]
* [[Francisco Suárez|Suárez]]

| group4 = 18th and 19th<br>centuries
| list4  =
* [[Mikhail Bakunin|Bakunin]]
* [[Frédéric Bastiat|Bastiat]]
* [[Cesare Beccaria|Beccaria]]
* [[Jeremy Bentham|Bentham]]
* [[Henry St John, 1st Viscount Bolingbroke|Bolingbroke]]
* [[Louis de Bonald|Bonald]]
* [[Edmund Burke|Burke]]
* [[Thomas Carlyle|Carlyle]]
* [[Auguste Comte|Comte]]
* [[Marquis de Condorcet|Condorcet]]
* [[Benjamin Constant|Constant]]
* [[Juan Donoso Cortés|Cortés]]
* [[Friedrich Engels|Engels]]
* [[Johann Gottlieb Fichte|Fichte]]
* [[Charles Fourier|Fourier]]
* [[Benjamin Franklin|Franklin]]
* [[William Godwin|Godwin]]
* [[Karl Ludwig von Haller|Haller]]
* [[Georg Wilhelm Friedrich Hegel|Hegel]]
* [[Johann Gottfried Herder|Herder]]
* [[David Hume|Hume]]
* [[Muhammad Iqbal|Iqbal]]
** [[Muhammad Iqbal's political philosophy|political philosophy]]
* [[Thomas Jefferson|Jefferson]]
* [[Immanuel Kant|Kant]]
** [[Political philosophy of Immanuel Kant|political philosophy]]
* [[Gustave Le Bon|Le Bon]]
* [[Pierre Guillaume Frédéric le Play|Le Play]]
* [[James Madison|Madison]]
* [[Joseph de Maistre|Maistre]]
* [[Karl Marx|Marx]]
* [[Giuseppe Mazzini|Mazzini]]
* [[John Stuart Mill|Mill]]
* [[Montesquieu]]
* [[Friedrich Nietzsche|Nietzsche]]
* [[Robert Owen|Owen]]
* [[Thomas Paine|Paine]]
* [[Ernest Renan|Renan]]
* [[Jean-Jacques Rousseau|Rousseau]]
* [[Marquis de Sade|Sade]]
* [[Henri de Saint-Simon|Saint-Simon]]
* [[Adam Smith|Smith]]
* [[Herbert Spencer|Spencer]]
* [[Germaine de Staël|de Staël]]
* [[Max Stirner|Stirner]]
* [[Hippolyte Taine|Taine]]
* [[Henry David Thoreau|Thoreau]]
* [[Alexis de Tocqueville|Tocqueville]]
* [[Benjamin Tucker|Tucker]]
* [[Voltaire]]

| group5 = 20th and 21st<br>centuries
| list5 =
* [[Giorgio Agamben|Agamben]]
* [[B. R. Ambedkar|Ambedkar]]
* [[Hannah Arendt|Arendt]]
* [[Raymond Aron|Aron]]
* [[Alain Badiou|Badiou]]
* [[Zygmunt Bauman|Bauman]]
* [[Alain de Benoist|Benoist]]
* [[Isaiah Berlin|Berlin]]
* [[Eduard Bernstein|Bernstein]]
* [[James Burnham|Burnham]]
* [[Noam Chomsky|Chomsky]]
* [[Roman Dmowski|Dmowski]]
* [[W. E. B. Du Bois|Du Bois]]
* [[Aleksandr Dugin|Dugin]]
* [[Ronald Dworkin|Dworkin]]
* [[Julius Evola|Evola]]
* [[Michel Foucault|Foucault]]
* [[Erich Fromm|Fromm]]
* [[Francis Fukuyama|Fukuyama]]
* [[Mahatma Gandhi|Gandhi]]
* [[Giovanni Gentile|Gentile]]
* [[Antonio Gramsci|Gramsci]]
* [[René Guénon|Guénon]]
* [[Jürgen Habermas|Habermas]]
* [[Friedrich Hayek|Hayek]]
* [[Hans-Hermann Hoppe|Hoppe]]
* [[Samuel P. Huntington|Huntington]]
* [[Karl Kautsky|Kautsky]]
* [[Russell Kirk|Kirk]]
* [[Peter Kropotkin|Kropotkin]]
* [[Ernesto Laclau|Laclau]]
* [[Vladimir Lenin|Lenin]]
* [[Rosa Luxemburg|Luxemburg]]
* [[Harvey Mansfield|Mansfield]]
* [[Mao Zedong|Mao]]
* [[Herbert Marcuse|Marcuse]]
* [[Charles Maurras|Maurras]]
* [[Robert Michels|Michels]]
* [[Ludwig von Mises|Mises]]
* [[Gaetano Mosca|Mosca]]
* [[Chantal Mouffe|Mouffe]]
* [[Antonio Negri|Negri]]
* [[Robert Nozick|Nozick]]
* [[Martha Nussbaum|Nussbaum]]
* [[Michael Oakeshott|Oakeshott]]
* [[José Ortega y Gasset|Ortega]]
* [[Vilfredo Pareto|Pareto]]
* [[Karl Popper|Popper]]
* [[Sayyid Qutb|Qutb]]
* [[Ayn Rand|Rand]]
* [[John Rawls|Rawls]]
* [[Wilhelm Röpke|Röpke]]
* [[Murray Rothbard|Rothbard]]
* [[Bertrand Russell|Russell]]
* [[Jean-Paul Sartre|Sartre]]
* [[Carl Schmitt|Schmitt]]
* [[Roger Scruton|Scruton]]
* [[Ali Shariati|Shariati]]
* [[Georges Sorel|Sorel]]
* [[Othmar Spann|Spann]]
* [[Oswald Spengler|Spengler]]
* [[Leo Strauss|Strauss]]
* [[Sun Yat-sen|Sun]]
* [[Charles Taylor (philosopher)|Taylor]]
* [[Eric Voegelin|Voegelin]]
* [[Michael Walzer|Walzer]]
* [[Max Weber|Weber]]

}}

| group6 = Works
| list6  =
* ''[[Republic (Plato)|Republic]]'' {{smaller|(c. 375 BC)}}
* ''[[Politics (Aristotle)|Politics]]'' {{smaller|(c. 350 BC)}}
* ''[[De re publica]]'' {{smaller|(51 BC)}}
* ''[[Treatise on Law]]'' {{smaller|(c. 1274)}}
* ''[[Monarchia]]'' {{smaller|(1313)}}
* ''[[The Prince]]'' {{smaller|(1532)}}
* ''[[Leviathan (Hobbes book)|Leviathan]]'' {{smaller|(1651)}}
* ''[[Two Treatises of Government]]'' {{smaller|(1689)}}
* ''[[The Spirit of Law]]'' {{smaller|(1748)}}
* ''[[The Social Contract]]'' {{smaller|(1762)}}
* ''[[Reflections on the Revolution in France]]'' {{smaller|(1790)}}
* ''[[Rights of Man]]'' {{smaller|(1791)}}
* ''[[Elements of the Philosophy of Right]]'' {{smaller|(1820)}}
* ''[[Democracy in America]]'' {{smaller|(1835–1840)}}
* ''[[The Communist Manifesto]]'' {{smaller|(1848)}}
* ''[[On Liberty]]'' {{smaller|(1859)}}
* ''[[The Revolt of the Masses]]'' {{smaller|(1929)}}
* ''[[The Road to Serfdom]]'' {{smaller|(1944)}}
* ''[[The Open Society and Its Enemies]]'' {{smaller|(1945)}}
* ''[[The Origins of Totalitarianism]]'' {{smaller|(1951)}}
* ''[[A Theory of Justice]]'' {{smaller|(1971)}}
* ''[[The End of History and the Last Man]]'' {{smaller|(1992)}}

| group7 = Related
| list7  =
* [[Authoritarianism]]
* [[Social organization#Collectivism and individualism|Collectivism and individualism]]
* [[Conflict theories]]
* [[Contractualism]]
* [[Critique of political economy]]
* [[Egalitarianism]]
* [[Elite theory]]
* [[Elitism]]
* [[Institutional discrimination]]
* [[Jurisprudence]]
* [[Justification for the state]]
* [[Philosophy of law]]
* [[Political ethics]]
* [[Political spectrum]]
** [[Left-wing politics]]
** [[Centrism]]
** [[Right-wing politics]]
* [[Separation of church and state]]
* [[Separatism]]
* [[Social justice]]
* [[Statism]]
* [[Totalitarianism]]
* '''[[Index of social and political philosophy articles|Index]]'''

| below =
* [[Category:Political philosophy]]

}}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
